---
title: "Portal Pulse"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/papaparse@5.4.1/papaparse.min.js"></script>
---

<style>
:root {
  --pulse-ink: #111827;
  --pulse-muted: #5f6b7a;
  --pulse-line: #dce3ea;
  --pulse-soft: #f5f7fa;
  --pulse-navy: #13294b;
  --pulse-blue: #4b9cd3;
  --pulse-green: #257a4b;
  --pulse-gold: #a96f16;
}

.pulse-shell {
  color: var(--pulse-ink);
  max-width: 1440px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 4px 18px 42px;
}

#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}

.pulse-top {
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.pulse-title-band,
.pulse-chat {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--pulse-line);
  border-radius: 8px;
}

.pulse-title-band {
  padding: 20px;
  min-height: 0;
}

.pulse-kicker {
  color: var(--pulse-blue);
  font-weight: 900;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.pulse-title {
  color: var(--pulse-navy);
  font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 5.2rem);
  line-height: 0.92;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  margin: 0 0 12px;
}

.pulse-subtitle {
  color: #334155;
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.45;
  max-width: 680px;
}

.pulse-panel {
  padding-top: 18px;
}

.pulse-panel-title {
  color: var(--pulse-navy);
  font-weight: 900;
  font-size: 1.02rem;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.prompt-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 8px;
}

.prompt-chip {
  border: 1px solid #cbd5df;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #f8fbff;
  color: #243247;
  padding: 9px 10px;
  min-height: 42px;
  font-weight: 850;
  text-align: left;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.prompt-chip:hover {
  background: #e8f4fb;
  border-color: #9ac7e4;
}

.pulse-chat {
  min-height: 660px;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: auto 1fr;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.pulse-messages {
  background: #f6f8fb;
  padding: 16px;
  overflow-y: auto;
  min-height: 540px;
  max-height: 76vh;
}

.pulse-empty {
  border: 1px dashed #bdc9d6;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fff;
  color: #334155;
  padding: 22px;
}

.pulse-empty-title {
  color: var(--pulse-navy);
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  font-weight: 950;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.pulse-empty-examples {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 8px;
  margin-top: 14px;
}

.pulse-empty-example {
  border-radius: 7px;
  background: #eef6fc;
  color: #24405f;
  padding: 8px 10px;
  font-weight: 850;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.pulse-exchange {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--pulse-line);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 14px;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(19, 41, 75, 0.06);
}

.question-block {
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e5ebf2;
  padding-bottom: 11px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.question-label,
.answer-label {
  color: var(--pulse-muted);
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.question-text {
  color: var(--pulse-navy);
  font-size: 1.02rem;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.answer-block {
  line-height: 1.42;
}

.answer-title {
  color: var(--pulse-navy);
  font-size: 1.08rem;
  font-weight: 950;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.answer-note {
  color: var(--pulse-muted);
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.player-result-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: 9px;
}

.player-card {
  background: #fbfdff;
  border: 1px solid #e0e8f1;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 11px;
}

.player-card-head {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
  gap: 9px;
  align-items: start;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.player-rank {
  color: #fff;
  background: var(--pulse-navy);
  border-radius: 999px;
  min-width: 28px;
  height: 28px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 0.84rem;
  font-weight: 950;
}

.player-link {
  color: var(--pulse-navy);
  font-weight: 950;
  text-decoration: underline;
  text-decoration-style: dotted;
  text-underline-offset: 3px;
}

.player-link:hover {
  color: #2f78aa;
  text-decoration-style: solid;
}

.player-sub {
  color: var(--pulse-muted);
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  margin-top: 2px;
}

.stat-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(6, minmax(70px, 1fr));
  gap: 6px;
}

.stat-tile {
  background: #f3f7fb;
  border: 1px solid #e4ebf2;
  border-radius: 7px;
  padding: 7px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.stat-value {
  color: var(--pulse-ink);
  font-weight: 950;
  line-height: 1;
}

.stat-label {
  color: var(--pulse-muted);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  margin-top: 3px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.pulse-footer {
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--pulse-line);
  background: #fff;
  padding: 14px;
}

.pulse-form {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr auto auto;
  gap: 10px;
}

.pulse-input {
  border: 1px solid #cbd5df;
  border-radius: 8px;
  min-height: 46px;
  padding: 10px 12px;
  color: var(--pulse-ink);
  background: #fff;
}

.pulse-submit {
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--pulse-navy);
  color: #fff;
  min-height: 46px;
  padding: 10px 18px;
  font-weight: 950;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.pulse-submit:hover {
  background: #1d3b68;
}

.pulse-clear {
  border: 1px solid #cbd5df;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #f8fafc;
  color: #293548;
  min-height: 46px;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  font-weight: 900;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.pulse-clear:hover {
  background: #eef3f8;
}

.pulse-submit:disabled {
  opacity: 0.6;
  cursor: wait;
}

.small-note {
  color: var(--pulse-muted);
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  margin-top: 8px;
}

.scope-list {
  display: flex;
  gap: 6px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-top: 10px;
}

.scope-token {
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #eef6fc;
  color: #24405f;
  padding: 5px 8px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

@media (max-width: 920px) {
  .prompt-grid,
  .pulse-empty-examples {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
  
  .stat-row {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(70px, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 560px) {
  .pulse-shell {
    padding-left: 10px;
    padding-right: 10px;
  }

  .prompt-grid,
  .pulse-form,
  .pulse-empty-examples {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .player-card-head {
    grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
  }

  .stat-row {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}
</style>

```{=html}
<div class="pulse-shell">
  <div class="pulse-top">
    <section class="pulse-title-band">
      <div>
        <div class="pulse-kicker">Free local data engine</div>
        <h1 class="pulse-title">Portal Pulse</h1>
        <div class="pulse-subtitle">Ask basketball questions and get ranked answers from the portal dataset. Player names open their profile pages in this tab.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pulse-panel">
        <div class="pulse-panel-title">Quick hits</div>
        <div class="prompt-grid">
          <button class="prompt-chip" type="button" data-prompt="best guards likely to transfer">Best guards likely to transfer</button>
          <button class="prompt-chip" type="button" data-prompt="efficient ACC players">Efficient ACC players</button>
          <button class="prompt-chip" type="button" data-prompt="best shooters in the Big Ten">Best shooters in the Big Ten</button>
          <button class="prompt-chip" type="button" data-prompt="top rebounders who may transfer">Top rebounders who may transfer</button>
          <button class="prompt-chip" type="button" data-prompt="best players on Duke">Best players on Duke</button>
          <button class="prompt-chip" type="button" data-prompt="players similar to Seth Trimble">Players similar to Seth Trimble</button>
        </div>
        <div id="pulse-scope" class="scope-list"></div>
      </div>
    </section>
  </div>

  <section class="pulse-chat" aria-label="Portal Pulse chat">
    <div class="pulse-footer">
      <form id="pulse-form" class="pulse-form">
        <input id="pulse-input" class="pulse-input" type="text" autocomplete="off" placeholder="Try: efficient ACC guards, best players on North Carolina, top transfer bigs..." />
        <button id="pulse-submit" class="pulse-submit" type="submit">Search</button>
        <button id="pulse-clear" class="pulse-clear" type="button">Clear</button>
      </form>
      <div class="small-note">Portal Pulse only answers from the basketball data loaded on this site.</div>
    </div>
    <div id="pulse-messages" class="pulse-messages"></div>
  </section>
</div>

<script>
let pulsePlayers = [];
let teamNames = [];
let confNames = [];

const stopWords = new Set(["a", "an", "and", "are", "as", "at", "be", "best", "for", "from", "give", "in", "is", "like", "me", "of", "on", "players", "player", "show", "the", "to", "top", "what", "who", "with"]);

const metricProfiles = {
  impact: {
    title: "Impact leaders",
    note: "Ranked by BPM, PORPAG, minutes, and role size.",
    score: row => n(row.BPM) * 9 + n(row.PORPAG) * 7 + n(row.MP) * 0.35 + n(row.USG) * 0.16,
    focus: row => fmtSigned(row.BPM)
  },
  efficiency: {
    title: "Efficiency standouts",
    note: "Ranked by true shooting, offensive rating, eFG, BPM, and enough role volume to matter.",
    score: row => pct(row["TS."]) * 34 + pct(row["eFG."]) * 18 + n(row.ORTG) * 0.22 + n(row.BPM) * 4 + n(row.USG) * 0.1 + minutesTrust(row),
    focus: row => `${fmt(row["TS."])}% TS`
  },
  shooting: {
    title: "Shooting fits",
    note: "Ranked by 3PT percentage, 3PT volume, eFG, free throw signal, and scoring impact.",
    score: row => pct(row["TP."]) * 45 + threeAttemptsPerGame(row) * 5 + pct(row["FT."]) * 8 + pct(row["eFG."]) * 12 + n(row.BPM) * 2 + minutesTrust(row),
    focus: row => `${fmtPct(row["TP."])} 3PT`
  },
  scoring: {
    title: "Scoring options",
    note: "Ranked by points, usage, true shooting, offensive BPM, and minutes.",
    score: row => n(row.PTS) * 3 + n(row.USG) * 1.1 + pct(row["TS."]) * 15 + n(row.OBPM) * 5 + n(row.MP) * 0.3,
    focus: row => `${fmt(row.PTS)} PPG`
  },
  playmaking: {
    title: "Playmaking guards and connectors",
    note: "Ranked by assists, assist rate, AST/TOV, turnover control, and role size.",
    score: row => n(row.AST) * 8 + n(row["AST."]) * 1.3 + n(row.AST_TOV) * 6 - n(row["TO."]) * 0.45 + n(row.MP) * 0.3 + n(row.BPM) * 2,
    focus: row => `${fmt(row.AST)} AST`
  },
  rebounding: {
    title: "Rebounding targets",
    note: "Ranked by rebounds, offensive and defensive rebounding rates, size role, and BPM.",
    score: row => n(row.REB) * 7 + n(row["ORB."]) * 1.2 + n(row["DRB."]) * 1.1 + n(row.BPM) * 2 + minutesTrust(row),
    focus: row => `${fmt(row.REB)} REB`
  },
  defense: {
    title: "Defensive activity",
    note: "Ranked by defensive BPM, steals, blocks, rebounding, and defensive PORPAG.",
    score: row => n(row.DBPM) * 8 + n(row.STL) * 5 + n(row.BLK) * 5 + n(row["STL."]) * 0.9 + n(row["BLK."]) * 0.9 + n(row["D_PORPAG"]) * 4,
    focus: row => `${fmtSigned(row.DBPM)} DBPM`
  },
  transfer: {
    title: "Likely transfer names",
    note: "Ranked by model transfer probability, current impact, role size, and usage context.",
    score: row => transferProb(row) * 80 + n(row.BPM) * 4 + n(row.MP) * 0.25 + n(row.USG) * 0.12,
    focus: row => `${fmtPct(transferProb(row))} transfer`
  },
  underused: {
    title: "Underused value signals",
    note: "Ranked by impact relative to minutes and model flags for hidden production.",
    score: row => flag(row.underused_star) * 40 + flag(row.underused_good_player) * 28 + flag(row.low_role_high_output) * 22 + n(row.BPM) * 6 - n(row.MP) * 0.28 + n(row.PORPAG) * 5,
    focus: row => `${fmt(row.MP)} MPG`
  }
};

function n(value) {
  if (value === null || value === undefined || value === "") return 0;
  const parsed = parseFloat(String(value).replace(/%/g, "").trim());
  return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : 0;
}

function flag(value) {
  return String(value ?? "").trim() === "1" ? 1 : 0;
}

function pct(value) {
  const valueNum = n(value);
  if (valueNum > 1) return valueNum / 100;
  return valueNum;
}

function clamp(value, min, max) {
  return Math.min(Math.max(value, min), max);
}

function transferProb(row) {
  if (row.transfer_prob !== undefined) return pct(row.transfer_prob);
  if (row.transfer_show !== undefined) return pct(row.transfer_show);
  return pct(row.pred_transfer);
}

function returnProb(row) {
  if (row.return_prob !== undefined) return pct(row.return_prob);
  if (row.return_show !== undefined) return pct(row.return_show);
  return pct(row.pred_return);
}

function threeAttemptsPerGame(row) {
  const gp = Math.max(n(row.GP), 1);
  return n(row.TPA) / gp;
}

function minutesTrust(row) {
  return Math.min(n(row.MP), 28) * 0.22 + Math.min(n(row.GP), 25) * 0.08;
}

function reliableSample(row) {
  return n(row.GP) >= 8 && n(row.MP) >= 8;
}

function broadSample(row) {
  return n(row.GP) >= 5 && n(row.MP) >= 5;
}

function escapeHtml(value) {
  return String(value ?? "").replace(/[&<>"']/g, ch => ({
    "&": "&amp;",
    "<": "&lt;",
    ">": "&gt;",
    '"': "&quot;",
    "'": "&#39;"
  }[ch]));
}

function normalize(value) {
  return String(value ?? "").toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9.\s-]/g, " ").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
}

function fmt(value, digits = 1) {
  const valueNum = n(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(valueNum)) return "-";
  return valueNum.toFixed(digits);
}

function fmtSigned(value) {
  const valueNum = n(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(valueNum)) return "-";
  return `${valueNum >= 0 ? "+" : ""}${valueNum.toFixed(1)}`;
}

function fmtPct(value) {
  const valueNum = pct(value) * 100;
  if (!Number.isFinite(valueNum)) return "-";
  return `${valueNum.toFixed(1)}%`;
}

function movementDirection(row) {
  return normalize(row.pred_movement_direction);
}

function movementLevel(row) {
  return normalize(row.pred_movement_label);
}

function playerLink(row) {
  const name = escapeHtml(row.player || "Unknown player");
  const pid = encodeURIComponent(row.pid || "");
  if (!pid) return name;
  return `<a class="player-link" href="player_pages.html?open=player&pid=${pid}" aria-label="Open player page for ${name}">${name}</a>`;
}

function enrich(row) {
  return {
    ...row,
    searchText: normalize([row.player, row.team, row.conf, row.Role, row.class, row.height, row.Hometown].filter(Boolean).join(" "))
  };
}

function roleMatches(row, role) {
  const roleText = normalize(row.Role);
  if (role === "guard") return ["pure pg", "scoring pg", "combo g"].includes(roleText);
  if (role === "wing") return ["wing f", "wing g"].includes(roleText);
  if (role === "big") return ["stretch 4", "pf/c", "c"].includes(roleText);
  if (role === "point") return ["pure pg", "scoring pg"].includes(roleText);
  return true;
}

function detectRole(query) {
  if (/\b(point guard|pg|pure pg)\b/.test(query)) return "point";
  if (/\b(guard|guards|backcourt|ball handler|ball-handling)\b/.test(query)) return "guard";
  if (/\b(wing|wings|small forward)\b/.test(query)) return "wing";
  if (/\b(big|bigs|frontcourt|center|post|pf|stretch 4|rebounder|rebounders)\b/.test(query)) return "big";
  return null;
}

function detectMetric(query) {
  if (/\b(similar|comp|compare|comparison|like)\b/.test(query)) return "similar";
  if (/\b(underused|sleeper|sleepers|hidden|undervalued|low role)\b/.test(query)) return "underused";
  if (/\b(shoot|shooter|shooters|three|3pt|3 point|3-point|spacing|spacer)\b/.test(query)) return "shooting";
  if (/\b(efficient|efficiency|true shooting|ts|efg|ortg|offensive rating)\b/.test(query)) return "efficiency";
  if (/\b(rebound|rebounder|rebounders|boards|glass)\b/.test(query)) return "rebounding";
  if (/\b(assist|assists|playmaker|playmaking|passer|passing|creator|creation)\b/.test(query)) return "playmaking";
  if (/\b(defense|defensive|defender|steal|steals|block|blocks|rim protector)\b/.test(query)) return "defense";
  if (/\b(score|scorer|scorers|points|ppg|bucket)\b/.test(query)) return "scoring";
  if (/\b(transfer|transfers|portal|leave|leaving|available|availability|step up|step-up|step down|step-down|lateral|move up|move down)\b/.test(query)) return "transfer";
  return "impact";
}

function findEntity(query, values) {
  const sorted = [...values].sort((a, b) => String(b).length - String(a).length);
  return sorted.find(value => {
    const entity = normalize(value);
    return entity && new RegExp(`(^|\\s)${escapeRegExp(entity)}(\\s|$)`).test(query);
  }) || "";
}

function escapeRegExp(value) {
  return String(value).replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&");
}

function findMentionedPlayer(query) {
  const direct = pulsePlayers
    .filter(row => row.player)
    .sort((a, b) => String(b.player).length - String(a.player).length)
    .find(row => query.includes(normalize(row.player)));
  if (direct) return direct;

  const marker = query.match(/\b(?:similar to|like|compare|comp)\s+(.+)$/);
  const target = marker ? marker[1].trim() : query;
  const targetTokens = normalize(target).split(" ").filter(token => token && !stopWords.has(token));
  if (!targetTokens.length) return null;

  return pulsePlayers
    .map(row => {
      const name = normalize(row.player);
      const score = targetTokens.reduce((sum, token) => sum + (name.includes(token) ? token.length : 0), 0);
      return { row, score };
    })
    .filter(item => item.score >= 4)
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || n(b.row.BPM) - n(a.row.BPM))[0]?.row || null;
}

function parseQuestion(question) {
  const query = normalize(question);
  const team = findEntity(query, teamNames);
  const conf = findEntity(query, confNames);
  const role = detectRole(query);
  const metric = detectMetric(query);
  const mentionedPlayer = metric === "similar" ? findMentionedPlayer(query) : null;
  const hasBasketballIntent = metric !== "impact" || role || team || conf || /\b(team|teams|conference|conference|player|players|guard|wing|big|bpm|usage|minutes|portal|basketball|transfer|roster|target|fit|movement|step up|step down|lateral)\b/.test(query);
  return { query, team, conf, role, metric, mentionedPlayer, hasBasketballIntent };
}

function filteredPlayers(parsed) {
  const allowsSmallRoles = parsed.metric === "underused";
  let rows = pulsePlayers.filter(row => row.player && row.pid && (allowsSmallRoles ? broadSample(row) : reliableSample(row)));
  if (parsed.team) rows = rows.filter(row => normalize(row.team) === normalize(parsed.team));
  if (parsed.conf) rows = rows.filter(row => normalize(row.conf) === normalize(parsed.conf));
  if (parsed.role) rows = rows.filter(row => roleMatches(row, parsed.role));
  if (parsed.metric === "transfer" || /\b(transfer|portal|available|leave|leaving)\b/.test(parsed.query)) {
    rows = rows.filter(row => transferProb(row) >= 0.08 || flag(row.pred_transfer_flag));
  }
  if (/\b(return|stay|staying)\b/.test(parsed.query)) {
    rows = rows.filter(row => returnProb(row) >= 0.25);
  }
  if (/\b(step up|step-up|up transfer|move up|upside move)\b/.test(parsed.query)) {
    rows = rows.filter(row => movementDirection(row) === "up" || n(row.pred_movement_score) >= 10);
  }
  if (/\b(lateral|similar level|same level)\b/.test(parsed.query)) {
    rows = rows.filter(row => movementDirection(row) === "lateral" || Math.abs(n(row.pred_movement_score)) < 10);
  }
  if (/\b(step down|step-down|move down|down transfer)\b/.test(parsed.query)) {
    rows = rows.filter(row => movementDirection(row) === "down" || n(row.pred_movement_score) <= -10);
  }
  if (/\b(major step up|big step up|huge step up)\b/.test(parsed.query)) {
    rows = rows.filter(row => movementLevel(row).includes("major step up"));
  }
  return rows;
}

function similarPlayers(player) {
  return pulsePlayers
    .filter(row => row.pid !== player.pid && reliableSample(row))
    .map(row => ({
      row,
      score: -(
        Math.abs(n(row.BPM) - n(player.BPM)) * 1.5
        + Math.abs(n(row.USG) - n(player.USG)) * 0.45
        + Math.abs(n(row.MP) - n(player.MP)) * 0.2
        + Math.abs(n(row.PTS) - n(player.PTS)) * 0.34
        + Math.abs(n(row.REB) - n(player.REB)) * 0.26
        + Math.abs(n(row.AST) - n(player.AST)) * 0.35
        + (normalize(row.Role) === normalize(player.Role) ? 0 : 2.5)
      )
    }))
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
    .slice(0, 8)
    .map(item => ({ ...item.row, pulseScore: item.score }));
}

function answerQuestion(question) {
  const parsed = parseQuestion(question);
  if (!parsed.hasBasketballIntent) {
    return {
      title: "Basketball data only",
      note: "Portal Pulse is limited to this site's player, team, transfer, and projection data.",
      rows: [],
      metric: "impact"
    };
  }

  if (parsed.metric === "similar") {
    if (!parsed.mentionedPlayer) {
      return {
        title: "I need a player name for comps",
        note: "Try something like: players similar to Seth Trimble.",
        rows: [],
        metric: "similar"
      };
    }
    return {
      title: `Players similar to ${parsed.mentionedPlayer.player}`,
      note: `Matched on BPM, usage, minutes, scoring, rebounding, assists, and role shape.`,
      rows: similarPlayers(parsed.mentionedPlayer),
      metric: "similar"
    };
  }

  const profile = metricProfiles[parsed.metric] || metricProfiles.impact;
  const rows = filteredPlayers(parsed)
    .map(row => ({ ...row, pulseScore: profile.score(row), pulseQuery: parsed.query }))
    .sort((a, b) => b.pulseScore - a.pulseScore || n(b.BPM) - n(a.BPM))
    .slice(0, 8);

  const scope = [
    parsed.role ? `${parsed.role} filter` : "",
    parsed.team || "",
    parsed.conf || ""
  ].filter(Boolean).join(" / ");

  return {
    title: scope ? `${profile.title}: ${scope}` : profile.title,
    note: profile.note,
    rows,
    focus: profile.focus,
    metric: parsed.metric
  };
}

function statTilesFor(row, metric) {
  const common = [
    ["BPM", fmtSigned(row.BPM)],
    ["PTS", fmt(row.PTS)]
  ];
  const profiles = {
    impact: [
      ["PORPAG", fmt(row.PORPAG)],
      ["USG", `${fmt(row.USG)}%`],
      ["MPG", fmt(row.MP)],
      ["Transfer", fmtPct(transferProb(row))]
    ],
    efficiency: [
      ["TS", fmtPct(row["TS."])],
      ["eFG", fmtPct(row["eFG."])],
      ["ORTG", fmt(row.ORTG)],
      ["USG", `${fmt(row.USG)}%`]
    ],
    shooting: [
      ["3PT", fmtPct(row["TP."])],
      ["3PA/G", fmt(threeAttemptsPerGame(row))],
      ["TS", fmtPct(row["TS."])],
      ["eFG", fmtPct(row["eFG."])]
    ],
    scoring: [
      ["USG", `${fmt(row.USG)}%`],
      ["TS", fmtPct(row["TS."])],
      ["OBPM", fmtSigned(row.OBPM)],
      ["MPG", fmt(row.MP)]
    ],
    playmaking: [
      ["AST", fmt(row.AST)],
      ["AST%", `${fmt(row["AST."])}%`],
      ["AST/TOV", fmt(row.AST_TOV)],
      ["TO%", `${fmt(row["TO."])}%`]
    ],
    rebounding: [
      ["REB", fmt(row.REB)],
      ["ORB", fmt(row.ORB)],
      ["DRB", fmt(row.DRB)],
      ["DRB%", `${fmt(row["DRB."])}%`]
    ],
    defense: [
      ["DBPM", fmtSigned(row.DBPM)],
      ["STL", fmt(row.STL)],
      ["BLK", fmt(row.BLK)],
      ["D-PORPAG", fmt(row.D_PORPAG)]
    ],
    transfer: [
      ["Return", fmtPct(returnProb(row))],
      ["MPG", fmt(row.MP)],
      ["USG", `${fmt(row.USG)}%`],
      ["Transfer", fmtPct(transferProb(row))]
    ],
    underused: [
      ["MPG", fmt(row.MP)],
      ["USG", `${fmt(row.USG)}%`],
      ["PORPAG", fmt(row.PORPAG)],
      ["Transfer", fmtPct(transferProb(row))]
    ],
    similar: [
      ["USG", `${fmt(row.USG)}%`],
      ["MPG", fmt(row.MP)],
      ["REB", fmt(row.REB)],
      ["AST", fmt(row.AST)]
    ]
  };
  const tiles = [...common, ...(profiles[metric] || profiles.impact)];
  const hasTransferIntent = /\b(transfer|transfers|portal|leave|leaving|available|availability)\b/.test(row.pulseQuery || "");
  if (hasTransferIntent && !tiles.some(([label]) => label === "Transfer")) {
    return [...tiles, ["Transfer", fmtPct(transferProb(row))]];
  }
  return tiles;
}

function renderRows(rows, focus, metric = "impact") {
  if (!rows.length) {
    return `<div class="answer-note">No matching players were found in the current dataset.</div>`;
  }

  return `
    <div class="player-result-list">
      ${rows.map((row, idx) => `
        <article class="player-card">
          <div class="player-card-head">
            <div class="player-rank">${idx + 1}</div>
            <div>
              <div>${playerLink(row)}</div>
              <div class="player-sub">${escapeHtml(row.team || "Team NA")} - ${escapeHtml(row.conf || "Conf NA")} - ${escapeHtml(row.Role || "Role NA")} - ${escapeHtml(row.class || "Class NA")}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-row">
            ${statTilesFor(row, metric).map(([label, value]) => statTile(label, value)).join("")}
          </div>
        </article>
      `).join("")}
    </div>
  `;
}

function statTile(label, value) {
  return `
    <div class="stat-tile">
      <div class="stat-value">${escapeHtml(value)}</div>
      <div class="stat-label">${escapeHtml(label)}</div>
    </div>
  `;
}

function renderEmptyState() {
  const wrap = document.getElementById("pulse-messages");
  wrap.innerHTML = `
    <div class="pulse-empty">
      <div class="pulse-empty-title">Start with a basketball question.</div>
      <div>Use the search box above or tap a quick hit. Portal Pulse will return ranked answers from the site data and make player names clickable.</div>
      <div class="pulse-empty-examples">
        <div class="pulse-empty-example">efficient ACC guards</div>
        <div class="pulse-empty-example">best players on North Carolina</div>
        <div class="pulse-empty-example">top transfer bigs</div>
        <div class="pulse-empty-example">players similar to Seth Trimble</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
}

function appendExchange(question, answerHtml) {
  const wrap = document.getElementById("pulse-messages");
  const empty = wrap.querySelector(".pulse-empty");
  if (empty) wrap.innerHTML = "";
  const exchange = document.createElement("div");
  exchange.className = "pulse-exchange";
  exchange.innerHTML = `
    <div class="question-block">
      <div class="question-label">Question</div>
      <div class="question-text">${escapeHtml(question)}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="answer-block">
      <div class="answer-label">Portal Pulse</div>
      ${answerHtml}
    </div>
  `;
  wrap.insertBefore(exchange, wrap.firstChild);
  exchange.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "start" });
}

function clearChat() {
  renderEmptyState();
  document.getElementById("pulse-input").focus();
}

function submitQuestion(question) {
  const trimmed = question.trim();
  if (!trimmed || !pulsePlayers.length) return;
  const answer = answerQuestion(trimmed);
  appendExchange(trimmed, `
    <div class="answer-title">${escapeHtml(answer.title)}</div>
    <div class="answer-note">${escapeHtml(answer.note)}</div>
    ${renderRows(answer.rows, answer.focus, answer.metric)}
  `);
}

function setupPulse() {
  document.getElementById("pulse-scope").innerHTML = ["guards", "wings", "bigs", "ACC", "shooting", "transfer", "similar players"]
    .map(item => `<span class="scope-token">${escapeHtml(item)}</span>`)
    .join("");
  renderEmptyState();

  document.getElementById("pulse-form").addEventListener("submit", event => {
    event.preventDefault();
    const input = document.getElementById("pulse-input");
    submitQuestion(input.value);
    input.value = "";
  });

  document.querySelectorAll(".prompt-chip").forEach(button => {
    button.addEventListener("click", function() {
      const prompt = this.dataset.prompt || this.textContent;
      document.getElementById("pulse-input").value = prompt;
      submitQuestion(prompt);
      document.getElementById("pulse-input").value = "";
    });
  });

  document.getElementById("pulse-clear").addEventListener("click", clearChat);
}

Papa.parse("data/complete_2026_scored.csv", {
  download: true,
  header: true,
  skipEmptyLines: true,
  complete: function(results) {
    pulsePlayers = results.data.filter(row => row.player && row.pid).map(enrich);
    teamNames = [...new Set(pulsePlayers.map(row => row.team).filter(Boolean))].sort();
    confNames = [...new Set(pulsePlayers.map(row => row.conf).filter(Boolean))].sort();
    setupPulse();
  },
  error: function(error) {
    appendExchange("Load portal data", `<div class="answer-title">Data failed to load</div><div class="answer-note">${escapeHtml(error.message || error)}</div>`);
  }
});
</script>
```
